ques: Identify a course on Coursera related to 'Artificial Intelligence for Healthcare' and note the course duration along with the number of quizzes in Assessments.
answer: Course: "Foundations of AI in Healthcare" (part of the Artificial Intelligence for Healthcare Specialization on Coursera). Duration: 8 hours to complete (4 modules). Assessments: 13 (listed as "13 assignments" under Details to know → Assessments; Coursera labels these as assignments rather than quizzes).
